prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for EA888 Gen 3 (CJXB/CJXC) with 340 HP and 400 Nm torque, utilizing a 3.5" downpipe (APR DP-010-001) and CTS Turbo FMIC (CTS-VW-IC-0001) for optimized airflow and reduced intake temps under sustained boost

Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger (771868-5002S) with billet compressor wheel, ported turbine housing, and 0.82 A/R ratio, paired with a custom 3.5" turbo-back exhaust (Supersprint 039050) featuring 76mm piping and a non-resonated center section for aggressive spool and minimal backpressure

034 Motorsport Motorsport Engine Mounts (034-10-0001) and Density Line Rear Subframe Bushings (034-05-0001) to eliminate torque steer and subframe deflection, combined with a Sachs Performance Clutch Kit (3000 955 030) with cerametallic friction material for 500 Nm+ torque capacity
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (RB-VW07) with extended carbon fiber fenders (35mm front, 50mm rear), custom front splitter, and aggressive rear diffuser, paired with OEM+ Golf R side skirts (5G1 075 107/108) for a seamless OEM integration

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (DFV 20-VWS-M) with 24-way adjustable damping, 30mm front/20mm rear ride height adjustment, and spherical top mounts (034-40-1000) for precise camber control, complemented by H&R 25mm front/20mm rear anti-roll bars (51650-2) to reduce body roll

VMR V710 19x9.5 ET35 wheels in Hyper Black finish with 235/35/19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, paired with Brembo GT 355mm 6-piston front brake kit (09.9464.71) and 330mm 4-piston rear kit (09.9464.72), featuring slotted rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads for track-ready stopping power
